allow: PowerShell($winget = Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($winget\) { Write-Output "WINGET: $\($winget.Source\)" } else { Write-Output "NO WINGET" })

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\('c:\\Users\\PC\\Desktop\\test-pwa\\manifest.webmanifest'\); Write-Output \("First 4 bytes \(hex\): " + \($bytes[0..3] | ForEach-Object { '{0:X2}' -f $_ }\) -join ' '\); Write-Output "File length: $\($bytes.Length\)"; if \($bytes[0] -eq 0xEF -and $bytes[1] -eq 0xBB -and $bytes[2] -eq 0xBF\) { Write-Output "HAS UTF-8 BOM" } else { Write-Output "NO BOM" })
